message:
feat: integrate rich_rust for terminal UI

Add PiConsole wrapper providing styled terminal output:
- Agent event rendering (text, thinking, tools, errors)
- Table and panel rendering via rich_rust
- Rule/divider rendering
- Spinner styles for progress indication
- TTY detection with graceful non-TTY fallback
- Markup stripping for plain text output

Update main.rs to use PiConsole for print mode output.

Includes 3 new unit tests for TUI components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
